name: PSD Tools
author: r1n7aro
summary: PSD/PSB workflow Skill for inspecting, exporting, modifying, and rasterizing Photoshop files with Python.
description: Adds the `/psd` Locus Skill for Photoshop PSD/PSB workflows. It provides Python helper scripts and a JSON adapter for inspecting layer trees, exporting composites or layers, editing safe layer properties, adding generated PNGs as pixel layers, creating PSDs from images, and validating outputs with psd-tools and Pillow.

runtime.name: psd-tools[composite]
runtime.notes: Required for PSD/PSB parsing, compositing, and layer operations. Installed only with user approval.

runtime.name: Pillow
runtime.notes: Required for raster image export and editing. Installed only with user approval.
